title: Digest of UK Energy Statistics (DUKES) 2025
body: "The Digest of United Kingdom Energy Statistics (DUKES) is the annual energy statistics publication produced by DESNZ. It provides a detailed and comprehensive picture on the production and consumption of individual fuels and of energy as a whole.  If you require supporting data tables please refer to the DUKES table of tables, or alternatively email: energy.stats@energysecurity.gov.uk. "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
